I do exercise three times a week.
I drink water every morning.
I rest twice a day.
Hi Flavia! You always look full of energy. What is your secret?
Thank you, Lucas! I take care of my health every day. It is all about good habits.
Really? What do you do every morning?
Every morning, I drink water and I do exercise for twenty minutes.
That is great. And how often do you rest during the day?
Twice a day, I stop and I relax for ten minutes. It helps with stress.
I have a lot of stress at work. Maybe I need more balance.
Yes! Start small. Three times a week, I walk in the park. You can try it too.
I take care of my health every day.
Every morning, I do exercise and drink water.
Twice a day, I rest and relax for a few minutes.
I get eight hours of sleep every night.
Good habits give me more energy and less stress.

Hi, this is Flavia. Let me tell you about my healthy week. Every morning, I do exercise for twenty minutes and I drink a glass of water. I eat three meals a day, and I never skip breakfast. Twice a day, I stop and I rest for ten minutes to relax. I get eight hours of sleep every night. These small habits give me more energy and less stress. Try one new habit this week!

Good morning, and welcome to the Healthy Life podcast. Here is a simple tip for a better week. First, drink water every morning. Second, do exercise at least three times a week. Third, take a short break twice a day to rest and relax. And remember, sleep is very important, so get seven or eight hours every night. Small habits make a big difference. Have a healthy week!

First, every morning, Flavia drinks a glass of water and does exercise. Then she eats a healthy breakfast before work. Twice a day, she rests for ten minutes to relax. In the evening, she takes a short walk to lower her stress. Finally, she gets eight hours of sleep every night.
